title: Device Home Screen - Internet is off - User Guide
scenario: User Guide shows "Something went wrong" error when opened from Device Settings with no internet and a newly connected Bluetooth device
steps: 1. Ensure the device has no internet connection (airplane mode or Wi-Fi/Bluetooth off).
2. Pair and connect a new Poly Bluetooth audio device via the device's Bluetooth settings.
3. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
5. Tap on the connected [Device Name] to enter Device Settings.
6. Tap on "User Guide" in the Device Settings page.
expected: The User Guide should load and display properly, or if no internet, a clear offline message should be shown with a way to retry or dismiss.
